commands.review_summary:
Adds a truncated assistant-turn detector to the embedded runner, logs a warning for detected truncation, and adds focused tests around partial streamed payloads with missing or length stop reasons.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +148. Total +203 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. Source inspection shows the current payload-count guard can suppress the incomplete-turn error for non-toolUse partial payloads, but the real Ollama/llama.cpp truncation path still needs runtime proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the blockers are contributor proof and maintainer acceptance of fail-closed provider terminal handling, not a narrow code repair ClawSweeper can safely make.

target.title: fix(agents): detect truncated API responses to prevent silent session hang
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89051 ŌĆö embedded agent sessions silently hanging after a truncated API response with no error logging or recovery.

**Root cause:** When an API stream ends without a proper `finish_reason` (or with `stopReason: "length"`), and the last assistant message contains incomplete/unsigned thinking blocks, `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` bails early at the `payloadCount > 0` guard. This causes the run loop to treat the truncated turn as a successful completion, returning `livenessState: "working"` with no further API calls, no error logs, and no recovery path.

**Fix:** Adds a `isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn` detector that identifies truncated responses (missing/length stopReason + incomplete-thinking assessment from `assessLastAssistantMessage`). This detector:

1. **Bypasses the `payloadCount > 0` short-circuit** in `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` ŌĆö truncated responses now surface the incomplete-turn error even when partial text was streamed (parallel to existing `toolUseTerminal` guard from #76477)
2. **Extends the terminal detection** gate so truncated responses don't silently pass through when other detectors miss them
3. **Logs a clear warning** in the run loop when truncation is detected, giving operators visibility into what was previously a 14-minute silent window

## Changes

- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/incomplete-turn.ts`: New `isTruncatedTerminalAssistantTurn` export + wired into `resolveIncompleteTurnPayloadText` as a bypass guard
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts`: Import + log.warn when truncation is detected before the success exit path
- `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts`: 9 new tests (6 unit + 2 integration-level + 1 end-to-end via `runEmbeddedAgent`)

## Test plan

- [x] All 121 incomplete-turn tests pass (no regressions)
- [x] All 40 overflow-compaction tests pass
- [x] All 6 compaction-loop-guard tests pass
- [x] New tests verify: unsigned thinking + missing stopReason ŌåÆ detected; stopReason=length ŌåÆ detected; valid content + stop ŌåÆ not flagged; toolUse stop ŌåÆ not flagged; null assistant ŌåÆ not flagged
- [x] Integration test: `payloadCount > 0` + truncated response ŌåÆ error surfaced (previously returned null)
- [x] End-to-end test via full `runEmbeddedAgent`: truncated Ollama response with partial streamed text ŌåÆ error payload + warn log (previously silent success)
- [x] Type-check passes cleanly (`pnpm tsgo`)

## Real behavior proof

**End-to-end integration test exercising the full `runEmbeddedAgent` run loop** ŌĆö simulates the exact #89051 scenario (Ollama model, partial text streamed, API response truncates mid-thinking with no finish_reason):

```
Ō£ō runEmbeddedAgent incomplete-turn safety > surfaces error and logs warning for truncated API response with partial streamed text (#89051)
```

This test:
1. Mocks `buildEmbeddedRunPayloads` to return a streamed payload (payloadCount > 0)
2. Mocks the attempt result with an unsigned thinking block and no `stopReason` (simulating truncated stream)
3. Verifies the run returns `{ isError: true, text: "...couldn't generate a response..." }` instead of the partial text
4. Verifies `log.warn` fires with `"truncated API response detected"` and `"stopReason=missing"`

**Before fix (reproducing silent hang):**
```
result.payloads = [{"text":"partial reasoning..."}]  // ŌåÉ silently returned as success
result.meta.livenessState = "working"                // ŌåÉ session appears healthy
warnMessages = []                                    // ŌåÉ zero operator visibility
```

**After fix (error surfaced):**
```
result.payloads = [{"text":"ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ Agent couldn't generate a response...", "isError": true}]
result.meta.livenessState = "abandoned"
warnMessages = ["truncated API response detected: ... stopReason=missing payloadCount=1 postCompaction=false ŌĆö surfacing incomplete-turn error"]
```

The fix is purely defensive ŌĆö it converts a silent success into a visible error for the exact failure path described in #89051. Normal responses (with proper `stopReason` and valid content) are unaffected, as verified by the false-positive rejection tests.

ŌĆö [Joel Nishanth](https://offlyn.ai) ┬Ę [offlyn.AI](https://offlyn.ai)
target.author: joelnishanth
